content:
type: CLAIM
files: outlines/prompts.py
summary: Adding custom Jinja2 filters param to prompt decorator, from_str/from_file, and create_jinja_env() helper

fields.summary: Adding custom Jinja2 filters param to prompt decorator, from_str/from_file, and create_jinja_env() helper

content:
type: STATUS
files: outlines/prompts.py
summary: create_jinja_env(loader, filters=None) landed: builds env, sets builtin filters (name/description/source/signature/schema/args), then does env.filters.update(filters) last so caller-supplied filters win. prompt() now accepts prompt or prompt(filters=...); from_str/from_file take filters param too. If you add a global _FILTERS registry, insert your env.filters.update(_FILTERS) call right after builtins are set and before the local filters.update so local > global > builtin precedence holds.

If you add a global _FILTERS registry, insert your env.filters.update(_FILTERS) call right after builtins are set and before the local filters.update so local > global > builtin precedence holds.
